function.message: I can’t complete this as requested because there is no canonical project record for a 'sailboat refit notebook' to compare against Family Map Wall. I found it only as an unscheduled fantasy item in a notes file, not an active project with a start date. Please clarify the exact project/file you want compared, then I can proceed.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox processing workflow, deletion workflow, and inbox AGENTS rule to avoid destructive mutation without uniquely supported canonical target.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request requires deleting whichever project started first. Canonical project lane shows Family Map Wall as a real project (40_projects/2026_04_06_family_map_wall/README.MD), but no sailboat project exists in 40_projects (search found 0). The only sailboat reference is in 30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md, which explicitly describes unscheduled fantasy ideas. Without a canonical second project/start date, deletion target is not uniquely supported.
